subject: Fermi GBM trigger 299767472 (100702531) is not a GRB
body:
D. Tierney (UCD), reports on behalf of
the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 299767472 (100702531) 
at 12:44:30.38 UT on 02 July 2010, tentatively classified as a GRB, 
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to a particle event."
